events.cta:
Fairs, Summits and
New Business Connections

aboutUs.title: About Us
paragraphs: As Müstakil Fuarcılık, we deliver strong organisations that contribute to the development of the business world, bring sectors together and pave the way for new collaborations. For us, exhibition organisation is not simply about hosting an event; it is about creating a strategic platform that supports companies' growth, expansion into new markets and the establishment of lasting commercial relationships.

Müstakil Fuarcılık has been built on a deep-rooted vision and a strong business network infrastructure as a subsidiary of the Independent Industrialists' and Businessmen's Association (MÜSİAD). MÜSİAD's years of experience, its reputation in national and international business circles and its extensive member network form the core strength behind all the organisations we deliver. Thanks to this foundation, our fairs are not only spaces where participants showcase their products, but also meeting points where real business opportunities emerge, strategic partnerships are formed and trade finds direction.

In every organisation we undertake, we adopt an innovative and results-oriented approach that accurately analyses sector needs and prioritises participant and visitor experience. Through fairs we organise across a broad spectrum from agriculture and food to industry, technology and service sectors, we aim to contribute both to the Turkish economy and to global trade.
stats: We also possess strong expertise in the field of international exhibition organisation.
To help Turkish companies reach global markets, we organise national participation programmes for major fairs held in different regions of the world.
Within this scope, we offer our companies not only stand space but also end-to-end services such as target market analysis, the right fair selection, logistics support, promotion and B2B meetings.
Our aim is to ensure that our participants achieve maximum benefit from international fairs and are represented strongly on the global stage.
closing: Thanks to our international exhibition capabilities, we make it easier for our companies to enter new markets and support their export-oriented growth. We position every organisation not merely as a fair experience for our participants, but also as the starting point of sustainable international business partnerships.

We are a team that has made it its mission to bring together companies that want to grow with the right business partners. We act with the principles of trust, sustainability and efficiency, and we work to transform every fair into an investment opportunity that generates tangible value for our participants.

As Müstakil Fuarcılık, we believe that a connection established at the right time on the right platform can turn into the strongest partnerships of the future. With this understanding, we continue to bring the business world together and to be the starting point of new success stories.

associations.title: MÜSİAD – Independent Industrialists' and Businessmen's Association
description: With more than 14,000 members, a structure representing 60,000 businesses and an employment capacity of approximately 1.8 million people, MÜSİAD is one of Turkey's most influential business organisations. Through its organisational network reaching 81 provinces across Turkey and 100 points in 85 countries abroad, it offers a strong global trade ecosystem.

Standing out through its close cooperation with public institutions and its contributions to policy development processes, MÜSİAD actively continues its mission of being the voice of the business world. Müstakil Fuarcılık deepens its activities at national and international scale through the network and sphere of influence provided by this strong structure.

associations.title: MÜSİAD Expo
description: MÜSİAD Expo is one of Turkey's most prestigious multi-sector trade fairs, bringing together business people, investors and decision-makers from different sectors. The 2024 edition was opened in the presence of the President of the Republic of Türkiye, Mr Recep Tayyip Erdogan, and hosted more than 50,000 visitors from 114 countries, including 8,000 international visitors.

With its high-profile participant structure, international visitor network and the trade volume it generates, MÜSİAD Expo is not only a fair but also a powerful B2B and B2G business development platform. This organisational accumulation adds direct value to all projects of Müstakil Fuarcılık.

associations.title: IBF – International Business Forum
description: The International Business Forum (IBF) is a globally effective business development platform that brings together business people, investors and public representatives from around the world. With its B2B and B2G-oriented structure, it contributes to the development of cross-border trade relations and the establishment of new partnerships.

Thanks to the international connection network offered by IBF, Müstakil Fuarcılık organisations gain a structure integrated not only with local markets but also with the global business world, creating sustainable and high value-added business opportunities for participating companies.

intro.title: MÜSTAKİL FUAR/ ORGANİZASYON Connect
intro.text: Connect brings together MÜSTAKİL FUAR/ ORGANİZASYON exhibitors and visitors in industry communities. Here, professionals from different sectors build business connections and stay in touch online 365 days a year.

whatIs.title: What is Connect?
bullets: MÜSTAKİL FUAR/ ORGANİZASYON Connect keeps our event communities active throughout the year and brings the industry together in a single hub.
Participants can share relevant content in the feed whether or not they attend the fairs.
We create additional networking opportunities for the industry through carefully curated online expert events.
The platform learns from interactions and suggests better matches and new introductions.

communities.title: Aquaflame Connect
communities.description: Community for professionals in heat, water supply, heating equipment, engineering and pool sectors.

communities.title: MosBuild Connect
communities.description: Community for architects, designers, developers and suppliers

communities.title: TransRussia Connect
communities.description: Community for transport and logistics sector leaders

sales.intro: Our sales team is here to connect your brand with thousands of professional visitors, purchasing delegations and international business people at MÜSİAD EXPO 2026. Contact our sales team directly for stand rental, pricing, reservations and fair participation processes.
